productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Winter Purple Top
description: CompositionPurple shell top made of 60% cotton and 40% modal, has a ribbed round neckline, contoured panel on the front, contoured panel forming the sleeves and snipped polyester strips around the armholes and on the seamsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadecool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this purple shell top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The sheer layered panel trims on the armholes and seams lend this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and black heels and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
